creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
(In reply to Harald Schmalzbauer from comment #47)
> Here's my timestamp stripped and condensed log (grep -v -e event7 -e modeline /tmp/Xorg.0.log.notimes | xz -c | uuencode -m Xorg.DRIOK.log.xz):

Sorry, I messed up the modeline filter (capital M), please excuse the size...
For the records, here's my sed(1) command (RE) to strip the timestamp (for easy diff(1)ing):
sed -E 's,^\[[^]]+\][[:blank:]]+,,' /var/log/Xorg.0.log
